---
title: "Laboratory, Notebooks & Workbooks"
---

## The Laboratory webapp

Every chapter of the book ends with a **Webapp Laboratory** section
specifying a module: purpose, inputs, outputs, model assumptions, numerical
method, suggested experiments (E1–E4), and validation checks. The laboratory
implements those sections one-for-one, with the book's seeds.

[**Open the Laboratory →**](https://YOUR-LOVABLE-APP-URL)

## Per-chapter downloads

All three companions run the same Python engine — identical seeds, identical
numbers.

| Chapter | Notebook | Excel workbook |
|---|---|---|
| 1. Taxonomy · LDCF Sandbox | [ipynb](downloads/ch01_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch01_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 2. Stochastic Process & Cash-Flow Simulator | [ipynb](downloads/ch02_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch02_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 3. State Prices & Pricing Bounds | [ipynb](downloads/ch03_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch03_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 4. Stochastic DCF Engine | [ipynb](downloads/ch04_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch04_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 5. Liquidity Shock Simulator | [ipynb](downloads/ch05_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch05_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 6. NAV Unsmoothing & Filtering | [ipynb](downloads/ch06_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch06_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 7. Indifference Pricing Engine | [ipynb](downloads/ch07_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch07_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 8. Fund Cash-Flow Engine | [ipynb](downloads/ch08_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch08_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 9. LBO Valuation Engine | [ipynb](downloads/ch09_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch09_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 10. Venture Portfolio & Security Engine | [ipynb](downloads/ch10_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch10_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 11. Private Credit Engine | [ipynb](downloads/ch11_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch11_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 12. Real Asset Cash-Flow Engine | [ipynb](downloads/ch12_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch12_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 13. Exposure Switchboard | [ipynb](downloads/ch13_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch13_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 14. Optimal Exit Solver | [ipynb](downloads/ch14_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch14_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 15. Volterra & Signature Engines | [ipynb](downloads/ch15_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch15_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 16. Malliavin Sensitivity Engine | [ipynb](downloads/ch16_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch16_Laboratory.xlsx) |
| 17. Portfolio Construction Suite | [ipynb](downloads/ch17_laboratory.ipynb) | [xlsx](downloads/MFAA_Ch17_Laboratory.xlsx) |

## Reproducibility

Seeds follow the book convention `2026NNNN` and are printed in every output.
The engine source lives in the `mfaa-lab` repository; the laboratory's
validation endpoint (`/api/chNN/validation`) re-runs each chapter's checks
on demand.
